routines.title: Mock Intermediate Muscle gain Program
routines.overview: A customized 4-day routine utilizing gym exercises, tailored for intermediate level focusing on muscle gain. (GEMINI MOCK MODE)

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.coachingCue: Bring dumbbells to mid-chest level.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Rows
exercises.coachingCue: Pull dumbbell toward your hip.

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.coachingCue: Lock core, press overhead without leaning back.

exercises.name: Barbell Squats
exercises.coachingCue: Drive knees out, keep chest upright.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlifts
exercises.coachingCue: Hinge at the hips, keep back straight.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.coachingCue: Control the descent, do not lock knees.

exercises.name: HIIT Burpees
exercises.coachingCue: Explode upward on the jump.

exercises.name: Mountain Climbers
exercises.coachingCue: Keep hips low, drive knees fast.

exercises.name: High Knees
exercises.coachingCue: Pump arms, bring knees to waist level.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.coachingCue: Bring dumbbells to mid-chest level.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Rows
exercises.coachingCue: Pull dumbbell toward your hip.

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.coachingCue: Lock core, press overhead without leaning back.

exercises.name: Foam Rolling / Static Stretching
exercises.coachingCue: Breathe deeply, hold stretches for 30s.

routines.title: Beginner 3-Day Full Body Muscle Gain Program
routines.overview: This beginner-friendly routine focuses on building foundational strength and muscle mass through three full-body workouts per week. Each session targets major muscle groups using compound movements, promoting efficient muscle growth and improving overall fitness. Rest days are incorporated to ensure adequate recovery and prepare the body for the next training session.

exercises.name: Barbell Squat
exercises.coachingCue: Keep chest up and core tight; descend as if sitting into a chair.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.coachingCue: Maintain a slight arch in your lower back; control the descent and press with power.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.coachingCue: Pull the bar to your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press (Seated)
exercises.coachingCue: Keep your core braced and avoid arching your lower back excessively.

exercises.name: Leg Curl Machine
exercises.coachingCue: Focus on squeezing your hamstrings at the top of the movement.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.coachingCue: Keep your body in a straight line from head to heels, engage your abs.

exercises.name: Active Recovery Stretching
exercises.coachingCue: Focus on gentle movements, deep breathing, and lengthening tight muscles.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.coachingCue: Press through your heels, don't lock out your knees at the top.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.coachingCue: Lower the dumbbells slowly and control the press upwards, squeezing your upper chest.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.coachingCue: Pull towards your belly button, squeezing your shoulder blades together at the end.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift (RDL)
exercises.coachingCue: Keep a slight bend in your knees, push your hips back, and feel the stretch in your hamstrings.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.coachingCue: Lead with your elbows, raising dumbbells only to shoulder height.

exercises.name: Cable Crunches
exercises.coachingCue: Contract your abs, bringing your chest towards your hips, avoid pulling with your arms.

exercises.name: Active Recovery Stretching
exercises.coachingCue: Focus on gentle movements, deep breathing, and lengthening tight muscles.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.coachingCue: Hold the dumbbell close to your chest, keep elbows inside your knees at the bottom.

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press
exercises.coachingCue: Control the weight, press through your chest, and avoid shrugging your shoulders.

exercises.name: Single Arm Dumbbell Row
exercises.coachingCue: Keep your back straight and pull the dumbbell towards your hip, squeezing your back muscle.

exercises.name: Overhead Press Machine
exercises.coachingCue: Press the handles upwards, keeping your core engaged and avoiding excessive back arch.

exercises.name: Leg Extension Machine
exercises.coachingCue: Focus on squeezing your quads at the top of the movement, control the eccentric.

exercises.name: Bird-Dog
exercises.coachingCue: Keep your core stable, move slowly and deliberately, avoid rotating your hips.

exercises.name: Active Recovery Stretching
exercises.coachingCue: Focus on gentle movements, deep breathing, and lengthening tight muscles.

exercises.name: Active Recovery Stretching
exercises.coachingCue: Focus on gentle movements, deep breathing, and lengthening tight muscles.

routines.title: Intermediate Muscle Gain: 4-Day Gym Split
routines.overview: This intermediate 4-day workout routine is designed for muscle gain, focusing on a strategic upper/lower body split to maximize hypertrophy and strength. Each session targets major muscle groups with a combination of compound and isolation exercises, employing a moderate rep range for optimal muscle growth. Adequate rest days are included to facilitate recovery and prevent overtraining.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.coachingCue: Retract scapulae, keep feet planted firmly.

exercises.name: Pull-ups (or Lat Pulldown)
exercises.coachingCue: Focus on squeezing shoulder blades together at the top.

exercises.name: Barbell Overhead Press
exercises.coachingCue: Brace core tightly, press explosively overhead.

exercises.name: Bent-Over Barbell Rows
exercises.coachingCue: Maintain a flat back, pull the bar towards your lower abs.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bicep Curls
exercises.coachingCue: Keep elbows tucked, control the eccentric phase of the movement.

exercises.name: Triceps Pushdowns (Rope or Bar)
exercises.coachingCue: Lock elbows by your side, squeeze triceps at the bottom.

exercises.name: Barbell Squats
exercises.coachingCue: Go below parallel if possible, keep chest up and core tight.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlifts (Barbell)
exercises.coachingCue: Hinge at the hips, maintain a slight bend in the knees.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.coachingCue: Control the descent, push through your heels and entire foot.

exercises.name: Leg Curls (Seated or Lying)
exercises.coachingCue: Squeeze hamstrings strongly at the peak contraction.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.coachingCue: Keep your body in a straight line from head to heels, engage glutes.

exercises.name: Cable Crunches
exercises.coachingCue: Focus on contracting your abs, not just pulling with your arms.

exercises.name: Active Recovery Stretching
exercises.coachingCue: Deep breathing and gentle, sustained stretches.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.coachingCue: Focus on a good chest stretch at the bottom of the movement.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Rows
exercises.coachingCue: Pull with your back muscles, imagine pulling your elbows behind you.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raises
exercises.coachingCue: Lead with your elbows, slight bend in arms, stop at shoulder height.

exercises.name: Face Pulls (Rope)
exercises.coachingCue: Pull towards your face, externally rotate shoulders at the end.

exercises.name: Hammer Curls (Dumbbell)
exercises.coachingCue: Maintain a neutral grip throughout the movement to target brachialis.

exercises.name: Overhead Dumbbell Triceps Extension
exercises.coachingCue: Keep elbows close to your head, control the stretch at the bottom.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squats (Dumbbell)
exercises.coachingCue: Maintain an upright torso, drive through the heel of your front foot.

exercises.name: Leg Extensions
exercises.coachingCue: Squeeze quads hard at the top of the movement, controlled release.

exercises.name: Glute Ham Raises (or Hyperextensions)
exercises.coachingCue: Focus on hamstring and glute contraction to lift your body.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raises
exercises.coachingCue: Achieve a full range of motion, pause at the top and bottom.

exercises.name: Reverse Crunches
exercises.coachingCue: Lift your hips off the floor, control the descent slowly.

exercises.name: Active Recovery Stretching
exercises.coachingCue: Deep breathing and gentle, sustained stretches.

exercises.name: Active Recovery Stretching
exercises.coachingCue: Deep breathing and gentle, sustained stretches.

foodScans.advice: This chicken biryani with eggs provides a substantial amount of energy, protein, and carbohydrates, making it a good option for muscle recovery or fueling intense activity. Be mindful of the high calorie and fat content if managing weight; consider pairing with a side of raita or salad to add nutrients and fiber.
This biryani is a delicious and calorie-dense meal. Consider pairing it with a side salad or raita to add vegetables and probiotics, and enjoy in moderation as part of a balanced diet.

ingredients: Spices (e.g., turmeric, cumin, coriander, garam masala)
foodScans.advice: Biryani is a calorie-dense dish; consider mindful portion control, especially with the added fat and carbohydrates. Balance this meal with lighter, vegetable-rich options throughout the day to meet your nutritional goals.
